item.title: CVE-2026-31431 - CVE-2026-31431 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31431_SCA_WAZUH: Wazuh SCA Linux hardening policy for Copy Fail (CVE-2026-31431)
CVE-2026-31431-exp: 根据py版本，升级成了c和rust版本，带加密混淆、0依赖（仅技术学习与分享）
Copy-Fail: CVE-2026-31431 "Copy Fail" – Reachability Checker
CVE-2026-31431: None
CVE-2026-31431-exploit_py2_py3: 一个兼容python2和python3的CVE-2026-31431脚本
CVE-2026-31431-Copy-Fail-Detection-Toolkit: None
copy.fail-mitigation-MLM: Salt state to deploy a mitigation of the copy.fail vulnerability (CVE-2026-31431)

item.title: CVE-2026-41940 - CVE-2026-41940 - 未命名漏洞
item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
CVE-2026-41940-Exploit-PoC: This repository contains a Proof-of-Concept (PoC) exploit for CVE-2026-41940, a critical authentication bypass vulnerability in cPanel & WHM. The vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote attackers to gain unauthorized access to the control panel by abusing flaws in the login flow.
